creator: tod.jackson@gmail.com
text:
Since I was chasing the GNOME upgrades...

Seems like gnome-control-center will crash when clicking on Sharing and won't launch properly again without avahi enabled in rc.conf.

(gnome-control-center:2332): GLib-GObject-CRITICAL **: 23:59:37.265: g_object_bind_property_full: assertion 'G_IS_OBJECT (source)' failed

(gnome-control-center:2332): GLib-GObject-WARNING **: 23:59:37.266: invalid (NULL) pointer instance

(gnome-control-center:2332): GLib-GObject-CRITICAL **: 23:59:37.266: g_signal_connect_data: assertion 'G_TYPE_CHECK_INSTANCE (instance)' failed
